trivia_bullets.text: Uncommon Bird Wizard from Core Set 2021 (July 3, 2020). Previewed June 12, 2020, by Limited Resources host and commentator Marshall Sutcliffe via Twitter. No flavor text — mechanical complexity fills the text box.
sources: Scryfall preview field: source Marshall Sutcliffe, source_uri twitter.com/Marshall_LR/status/1271346641652420608

trivia_bullets.text: Two-ability uncommon: reduces flying creature spell costs by {1} and gets +1/+1 until EOT whenever another creature with flying enters under your control. At {W}{U} for a 2/2 it scales fast in flying-heavy boards. EDHREC rank 4,303 — ~32,000 tracked Commander decks. Primary homes: Alela, Artful Provocateur; Kangee, Sky Warden; Choco, Seeker of Paradise.
sources: WebSearch snippet: mtgbudgetcommander.com flying tribal guide

trivia_bullets.text: Pauper EDH (PDH) note: as a multicolor uncommon, Watcher of the Spheres is eligible as a PDH commander. A 'High Power PDH' build around it exists on Tappedout, positioning it as a flying-tribal cost-reducer at the helm.
sources: Tappedout.net: 'Watcher of the Spheres - High Power PDH' (via WebSearch snippet)

trivia_bullets.text: Art by G-host Lee, a digital artist with ~20 Magic cards (Gatherer). Work also includes Mu Yanling, Sky Dancer (Core Set 2020). No Hipsters of the Coast spotlight found for G-host Lee.

related_cards.name: Warden of Evos Isle
related_cards.note: Direct functional predecessor — white Bird that reduces flying creature costs

related_cards.name: Kangee, Sky Warden
related_cards.set: Commander Legends: Battle for Baldur's Gate
related_cards.note: Primary Bird tribal commander that runs Watcher of the Spheres

related_cards.name: Alela, Artful Provocateur
related_cards.note: Esper flying commander; one of Watcher's most common EDH homes

related_cards.name: Favorable Winds
related_cards.note: Flying anthem enchantment; frequent companion in flying tribal builds
